summary: Footer overlaps page elements on small viewports
environment: Mobile devices and small viewport heights
description: Depending on screen resolution, footer overlaps page elements such as navigation buttons, input fields, or checkbox area. Scrolling is not available, so affected elements remain inaccessible.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Open the landing page on a device with small viewport height
Observe the bottom part of the page

actual_result: Footer overlaps page elements. Navigation buttons, input fields, or checkbox area may be partially or fully hidden under the footer.
expected_result: Footer should not overlap page content. All page elements must remain fully visible and accessible on all supported viewport sizes.
notes: Issue may reproduce on different steps depending on device resolution.

summary: wizardAnswers cookie stores raw JSON instead of encoded value
description: The wizardAnswers cookie stores selected answers as raw JSON instead of an encoded value. This format may break payment flow when the cookie is passed further.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Complete steps that save answers to wizardAnswers cookie

actual_result: wizardAnswers cookie value is stored as raw JSON.
expected_result: wizardAnswers cookie value should be encoded before being stored.
notes: Correct encoded format is required to prevent issues on the payment page.

summary: Incorrect validation messages on input steps
description: Validation messages on name, email, and password steps do not match expected text.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Go to Step 4 and submit an empty or too short name
Go to Step 5 and submit an empty or invalid email
Go to Step 6 and submit an empty or too short password

expected_result: Validation messages should match expected texts exactly: 'Please enter your name', 'Your name should have at least 2 letters', 'Please enter your email address', 'Please enter a valid email address', 'Please enter your password', 'Your password must be at least 5 characters long'.

summary: Required policy links are missing in footer
description: Footer does not contain all required policy links.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Scroll to the footer or open any step where footer is visible

actual_result: Some required policy links are missing from the footer.
expected_result: Footer should contain all required policy links: Terms of Use, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, Billing Policy, Refund Policy, and Contact Us.

summary: Cookie widget layout does not match design on mobile
description: Cookie widget on Step 1 is visually larger than expected and its content layout does not match the design.

steps_to_reproduce.action: Open the landing page on a mobile device

actual_result: Cookie Widget is oversized, and the 'Agree & Close' button is displayed in one row with the text.
expected_result: Cookie Widget should be compact and match the mobile design. The button should be displayed below the text as designed.
notes: Issue is inherited from the source landing.
